---
id: create-group-conflict
title: "Declare a separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two groups"
description: "Rejects with 409 (group_conflict_violators) and the violator list if any user currently belongs to both groups, unless force=true. With force=true the conflict is recorded anyway and the violator list is returned as a report; existing memberships are not removed."
sidebar_label: "Declare a separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two groups"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Declare a separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two groups"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/admin/group-conflicts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Rejects with 409 (group_conflict_violators) and the violator list if any user currently belongs to both groups, unless force=true. With force=true the conflict is recorded anyway and the violator list is returned as a report; existing memberships are not removed.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
